item.title: Version 2.001.1
item.description:
What's new

  • New feature - Notch. Widgets, Clipboard, Airdrop, Pocket, Timer, Spaces sync, Apps, Folders and much more!
  • Music Widget supports Apple Music animated art in Full Cover Style for all sizes in Notch and main grid
  • Gesture with Finger Spread now closes LaunchMe
  • Fixed Music Widget bug that used too much CPU and Power
  • Fixed hidden apps unhide after restart Mac or in other cases
  • Fixed gesture might not working after Sleep until you turn it Off/On
  • 2.001.1 Fix: Spaces optimization in Notch
